went_well: 12 ElevenLabs audio files first-pass success, loudness outliers detected and normalized (+16/+14dB), 462KB total
16/16 gti sprites delivered with id-exact filenames enabling reward-${id}.png binding
Blender headless pipeline produced a 661-poly Gate Sovereign emblem in 9.2s wall time
went_wrong: Image generator painted fake checkerboard/greenscreen instead of alpha on 16/16 sprites; required flood-fill background repair
ElevenLabs key lacks voices_read scope, blocking voice catalog selection (premade Daniel voice used)
BlenderMCP addon cannot run in background mode; MCP tools timed out and CLI fallback was required

improvement_actions.action: Request transparent-background via explicit checker-detection prompt suffix or post-process pipeline as default for future sprite batches
For animated 3D pipeline (rig+action) run Blender with GUI or xvfb so BlenderMCP addon can serve live sessions
